title: Domain
description: Domain documents overview material for Domain in the language domain. It is classified as a concept page, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Domain model, Entity, Value Object, Aggregate, and Domain Service, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include ddd, language, and concepts, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is language / concepts / domain, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
